_comment: Hosts available to ssh_exec, postgres_query, pm2_status. 'key' references an entry in the 'keys' section below. Optional 'security_group_id' + 'region' enable automatic SSH/22 access management for the current public IP (auto-adds tagged 'mcp-auto-ssh' rule, auto-revokes stale tagged rules). Requires AWS CLI configured locally with EC2 permissions.
_comment_keys: Mapping of key names to .pem file paths. Forward slashes work cross-platform. Tilde (~) is expanded to $HOME or %USERPROFILE%.
